query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `chat_messages` (
  `id` serial PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `sessionId` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `role` enum('user','assistant') NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now())
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3yjy74Aq4fSfMvH.root --database ZpCxvttgRWUJYjQSvWcg6k --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `chat_messages` (
  `id` serial PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `sessionId` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `role` enum('user','assistant') NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now())
);
